summary: First-finish smoke of APDCL Connect. Backend auth, RBAC, queries, voting, admin endpoints all healthy. Frontend flows for employee (login/dashboard/queries/vote/filter/post/notifications/profile/logout) and admin (login lands on /admin/employees, 4 seeded employees, All Queries page shows 4 queries) all pass. Invalid credentials show error. No blockers found.
passed: POST /api/auth/login admin (AP10000/Admin@123) returns JWT + admin user
POST /api/auth/login employee (AP10234/Employee@123) returns JWT + employee user
POST /api/auth/login invalid returns 401 with 'Invalid employee ID or password'
GET /api/queries returns 3 seeded queries with author info + counts
GET /api/admin/employees (admin) returns 4 employees (admin excluded, filter role=employee works)
Frontend login form -> invalid password shows login-error
Employee dashboard renders welcome-hero with name/designation/department/ID and stat-posted/stat-engagement cards
Company Query page renders 3 query cards; agree-btn click succeeded; filter dropdown (week/all) works
Post Query submit creates new query; my-query card appears (confirmed via Admin All Queries showing 4 total)
Notification bell renders and opens; unread count badge visible (1) after vote
Profile page renders personal-info-card + change-password-card; wrong current password path executed
Admin login lands on /admin/employees with 4 emp-row entries
Admin All Queries shows 4 platform-wide queries with authors and delete controls
notes: Dashboard stats showed posted=0 for AP10234 before posting; expected since dashboard was loaded prior to Post Query submission (no bug, just navigation order).
No separate /api/notifications/unread-count endpoint exists; unread count is served via /api/notifications payload field 'unread_count' — matches frontend usage.
Deep coverage (password change happy path, edit/delete query dialogs, create/edit/delete employee cascade, notification mark-read/delete/mark-all, bcrypt DB check) deferred to full testing agent.
